I

insertAdministrator(Administrator) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Inserts a new administrator by calling the insertUser method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
insertClient(Client) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Inserts a new client by calling the insertClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
insertClient(Client) - Method in interface model.ClientDAO
Inserts a new client by calling the insertClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
insertClient(Client) - Method in class model.DBImplementationClient
Submits and processes a new Client persistence into the system layer.
insertCruise(Cruise) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Inserts a new cruise by calling the insertCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided cruise object and returns the result.
insertCruise(Cruise) - Method in interface model.CruiseDAO
Inserts a new cruise by calling the insertCruise method of the CruiseDAO
insertCruise(Cruise) - Method in class model.DBImplementationCruise
This method inserts a new cruise into the database based on the provided Cruise object.
insertUser(Administrator) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Inserts a new administrator by calling the insertUser method with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
insertUser(Administrator) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method inserts a new administrator into the database.
insertWorker(Worker) - Method in class controller.LoginController
Inserts a newly created worker into the system.
insertWorker(Worker) - Method in class model.DBImplementationWorker
 
insertWorker(Worker) - Method in interface model.WorkerDAO
This method inserts a new worker into the database based on the provided Worker object.
isEnglish() - Method in class model.Worker
 
isSpanish() - Method in class model.Worker
